description: Style Note Ramping up your formal wear wardrobe from time to time is always a good idea. Give it a boost with this grey mini skirt from tonga. Pair it with a light shirt with long sleeves and wear a colourful scarf to give yourself a formal makeover. Black high heels and chic accessories will suffice to complete the look. Product Details Charcoal grey formal mini skirt with an elasticised broad waistband, has stitched detailing at the hem Material and Care 74% rayon, 22% nylon, 4% spandex Hand wash cold Do not bleach Hang or line dry Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size M
